# Afenda UI package

Shared shadcn-style components, hooks, utilities, and global styles for the web client (`@afenda/ui`).

This package is consumed by `apps/web` via `@afenda/ui` (see `package.json` `exports`).

## Source index

| Area       | Description                                                                                          | Index                                             |
| ---------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------- |
| Components | Radix-based primitives and copy-in components (shadcn-style), exported as `@afenda/ui/components/*`. | [Components index](./src/components/ui/README.md) |
| Hooks      | React hooks exported from `@afenda/ui/hooks`.                                                        | [Hooks index](./src/hooks/README.md)              |
| Utilities  | Helper functions exported from `@afenda/ui/lib`.                                                     | [Utilities index](./src/lib/README.md)            |
| Styles     | Global CSS and design tokens for the UI package.                                                     | [Styles index](./src/styles/README.md)            |
